title: Freshdesk vs ConvertKit
description: Compare Freshdesk vs ConvertKit — a crm & sales platform versus a marketing & seo solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Freshdesk (CRM & Sales) and ConvertKit (Marketing & SEO) serve different primary purposes. ConvertKit has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is crm & sales or marketing & seo capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Freshdesk and ConvertKit?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk is a crm & sales tool, while ConvertKit is a marketing & seo platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Freshdesk replace ConvertKit?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Freshdesk or ConvertKit?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk (Free – $35/agent/mo) and ConvertKit (Free – $59/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
